item.description: How Tensorflow works function thisIsFunction(a,b){ return 'something' } filename=$1 if [ -f "$filename" ]; then echo "File exists" else echo "File does not exist" fi def SelectedPerson(participant): selected = ['Akbar Hossain', 'Zillur Rahman', 'Monalisa'] if(participant in selected): return True selectedList = filter(SelectedPerson, participant) print('The selected candidates are:') for candidate in selectedList: print(candidate)
